title: My Skills
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
name: Name
selectHint: AI will follow the role and instructions defined by the active skill
helpIntro: Skills let you customize AI's role and behavior. Once activated, AI responds the way you define — like hiring a specialist.
helpExample1: Turn AI into a senior engineer to review your code professionally
helpExample2: Turn AI into a marketing consultant to write social posts and ad copy
helpExample3: Turn AI into a data analyst to find key insights from your data
helpStep1: Create a Skill here — define AI's role and behavior instructions
helpStep2: Go to chat, select your Skill from the toolbar
helpStep3: AI will respond according to the Skill's instructions. Start working!
